[vc_row type="full_width_background" full_screen_row_position="middle" column_margin="default" bg_color="#ffffff" scene_position="center" top_padding="6%" bottom_padding="3%" text_color="dark" text_align="left" row_border_radius="none" row_border_radius_applies="bg" overlay_strength="0.3" gradient_direction="left_to_right" shape_divider_position="bottom" bg_image_animation="none"][vc_column column_padding="padding-5-percent" column_padding_position="all" background_color_opacity="1" column_shadow="none" column_border_radius="none" column_link_target="_self" width="1/1" tablet_width_inherit="default"][vc_column_text]

Keynote Speaking – Suli Breaks

A Suli Breaks keynote is unlike a standard conference talk. Combining the precision of a speaker with the emotional power of a spoken word artist, Suli delivers keynotes that shift how audiences think, feel, and act. He has addressed audiences at LinkedIn, BT, Lloyds Banking Group, Microsoft, the United Nations, the Houses of Parliament, TED, and across campuses, festivals, and corporate stages worldwide.

What a Keynote Looks Like

Suli's keynotes typically run 30–45 minutes and move through three stages: a spoken word opening that sets an emotional tone, a direct-address section that unpacks the theme with clarity and insight, and a close that leaves the audience with something concrete to carry. No slides. No filler. Just presence, language, and ideas that stick.

Topics

Every keynote is built around your event's theme. Suli speaks on entrepreneurship and creative ambition, identity and authenticity in the workplace, education and the future of learning, resilience and purpose, social change and representation, and unlocking creativity in teams and organisations. He writes bespoke material for each engagement — your keynote will not be a recycled talk.

Who Books Suli for Keynotes

Suli's keynote clients include FTSE 100 corporations running D&I and innovation programmes, universities and student unions looking to inspire graduates, conference organisers seeking a closer or opener that audiences will remember, and brands building internal culture and team engagement events.

Virtual Keynotes

Suli delivers virtual keynotes with the same preparation and impact as his live appearances. He adapts his delivery for the digital stage — direct to camera, tightly paced, and built for remote audience engagement. Virtual sessions can include live Q&A and breakout-ready formats.

Frequently Asked Questions

[/vc_column_text] [vc_toggle title="How long is a keynote?" el_id="how-long-is-a-keynote" style="default" size="md" color="Default"]Most keynotes run 30–45 minutes. Suli can also deliver a shorter 20-minute headline performance, or extend to a 60-minute format that includes structured Q&A. He will advise on the best length for your programme.[/vc_toggle] [vc_toggle title="Is the content bespoke or a standard talk?" el_id="is-the-content-bespoke-or-a-standard-talk" style="default" size="md" color="Default"]Bespoke. Suli researches your organisation, your audience, and your event theme before writing. What he delivers on the day is built specifically for that moment — not a generic keynote repackaged.[/vc_toggle] [vc_toggle title="Can Suli speak internationally?" el_id="can-suli-speak-internationally" style="default" size="md" color="Default"]Yes. Suli is available for keynotes across the UK, Europe, North America, and beyond. He has addressed audiences in multiple countries and is experienced at adapting for international and cross-cultural rooms.[/vc_toggle] [vc_toggle title="How do I check availability and get a fee?" el_id="how-do-i-check-availability-and-get-a-fee" style="default" size="md" color="Default"]Use the Get in Touch form with your event date, location, and expected audience size.
